design_philosophy: Dense table with keyboard-first inline review; built for high-throughput approval cycles by the Approver.
strengths: Many transactions visible at once without scrolling
Keyboard shortcuts on every common action
Bulk approve and reject for high-throughput days
weaknesses: Steeper learning curve for the keyboard shortcuts
Cramped on narrow screens or short windows
Single-keystroke approve risks a misclick on the wrong row
tradeoffs: Faster for daily approvers handling hundreds of rows; harder to learn for occasional reviewers who handle a few.
use_when: Daily approvers handling high transaction volume who are already familiar with the workflow.
